title: Immediate Requirement Store Manager at ProSport Ventures Solutions

jsonLd.title: Immediate Requirement Store Manager at ProSport Ventures Solutions
jsonLd.description:
Grow your career with ProSport Ventures Solutions! We are hiring a Store Manager for our Jodhpur team. Be part of a workplace that celebrates innovation, diversity, and performance.

About ProSport Ventures Solutions:
ProSport Ventures Solutions is a leading organization in the Hybrid sector, committed to excellence, innovation, and employee growth. We offer a dynamic work environment where talent is recognized and rewarded.

Key Responsibilities:
• Conduct regular stock audits and prevent pilferage
• Manage store operations to ensure smooth daily functioning
• Achieve sales targets and improve store performance metrics
• Build relationships with regular customers to drive loyalty
• Assist in recruiting, onboarding, and performance management of staff
• Train and motivate the sales team to deliver excellent service
• Coordinate with the supply chain team for timely stock delivery

Required Skills & Qualifications:
• Master's degree preferred
• 6-10 years of relevant experience
• Proficiency in Retail Operations
• Proficiency in Shrinkage Control
• Proficiency in Visual Merchandising
• Proficiency in Omnichannel Retail
• Proficiency in Retail Analytics
• Proficiency in Category Management
• Proficiency in Customer Service
• Proficiency in Loss Prevention

Work Mode: Hybrid - Flexible work-from-home and office

What We Offer:
• Flexible working hours
• Recognition and rewards programs
• Annual paid leaves and casual leaves
• Work-from-home flexibility
• Learning & development budget
• Employee stock options (ESOPs) for eligible roles
• Salary Range: 12 LPA - 25 LPA per annum

Location: Jodhpur, Rajasthan, India

If you are excited about this opportunity, apply now and take the next step in your career journey with ProSport Ventures Solutions!
